sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3969" key="a)lekto/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλεκτόρ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀλέκτωρ</etym>) <sense id="n3969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a fowl</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόπρος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.118</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
